channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Gaza pet owners struggle to keep animals healthy amid vet crisis
item.description: Animal lovers in Gaza are resorting to desperate measures to keep their pets alive and healthy.

item.title: Oval Office octagon: How Trump turned combat sports into a political weapon
item.description: MMA event reflects career deeply intertwined with professional fighting, but risks political fallout.

item.title: Gaza post-‘ceasefire’ deaths hit 983 as Israeli attack targets refugee camp
item.description: Israeli attack kills one person in central Gaza's Bureij camp, as a disabled Palestinian is shot in occupied West Bank.

item.title: As Iran and US near a deal, Tehran remembers another recent bloody conflict
item.description: Iranian authorities say assassinations and strikes over the past year have failed to deter them.

item.title: Thousands attend anti-racism rallies following unrest in Belfast
item.description: The rallies in Northern Ireland follow two nights of anti-immigrant violence provoked by a stabbing attack.

item.title: Iranians divided on peace prospects after US-Iran say a deal is near
item.description: Iranians gave mixed reactions as Iran and the US said they were close to an interim agreement to end the war.

item.title: Workers remove Trump’s name from Kennedy Center after court ruling
item.description: Judge says Trump-backed board's move to add president's name unlawful, requires Congressional approval.

item.title: From colony to cell: Sexual violence in Israeli prisons
item.description: This testimony is part of a wider pattern documented in reports describing sexual abuse inside Israeli prisons.

item.title: Fans reveal how much they paid for World Cup tickets
item.description: World Cup fans reveal how much they paid for a seat at the US’s opening game against Paraguay.

item.title: ‘Lots of things can still go wrong’ with US-Iran deal to end the war
item.description: Henry Ensher says the US–Iran agreement is not a final settlement but only the start of a process that can go wrong.

item.title: Iran announces funeral, burial dates for late Supreme Leader Khamenei
item.description: Funeral ceremonies will take place in Tehran and Qom before a burial in his home town of Mashhad.

item.title: Deadly military plane crash in India’s Assam
item.description: A military transport aircraft has crashed in India’s northeastern Assam during a routine fligh.

item.title: Football: Why is India struggling to play the world’s most popular sport?
item.description: As the 2026 FIFA World Cup kicks off, 101 East explores why India struggles to compete in the world's most popular sport

item.title: Five Indian air force staff killed as transport plane crashes in Assam
item.description: Antonov An-32 transport plane crashed near Assam’s Jorhat region, air forces says.

item.title: Violence erupts at anti-government protest in DR Congo
item.description: Hundreds demonstrated in Kinshasa against constitutional changes.

item.title: Qatar vs Switzerland: World Cup group match – preview, team news, lineups
item.description: After a disappointing home World Cup in 2022, Asian Cup champions Qatar are looking for better showing in North America.

item.title: Yemen’s ‘Spider-Man’ dies while scaling volcanic crater
item.description: Yemen’s 'Spider-Man' dies while scaling volcanic crater

item.title: Israel attacks Lebanon despite being included in potential peace deal
item.description: Israel has continued to attack Lebanon, despite Iran saying it was included in a potential memorandum of understanding.

item.title: The US border runs straight through the World Cup
item.description: The tournament was sold as a symbol of unity, but Trump’s border politics have turned it into a spectacle of exclusion.

item.title: US orders Anthropic to disable AI models for all foreign nationals
item.description: The company said it received ⁠an export control directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.

item.title: Knicks face Spurs in Game 5, with first NBA title in 53 years in sight
item.description: After an epic comeback, the New York Knicks head to San Antonio, hoping to beat the Spurs to seal the 2026 championship.

item.title: ‘Right to protest genocide’ denied: Scotland’s Palestine Action supporters
item.description: As the banned group fights its proscription in London, similar battles are playing out in Edinburgh.

item.title: Iran war day 106: US and Iran say deal close but Lebanon fighting continues
item.description: US and Iran say a deal to end the war is close, with a final text agreed but key steps still pending.

item.title: Molokhia cigarettes: Gaza’s toxic alternative to tobacco
item.description: Smokers in Gaza turn to toxic molokhia nicotine cigarettes as tobacco prices surge, causing serious health risks.

item.title: Doctors Without Borders investigation finds exploitation by staff in Chad
item.description: The organisation employs tens of thousands of workers, local and foreign, to respond to crises across several countries.
